project_type: Pine Script v6 TradingView trading indicator
build_system: TradingView platform (no local build - validation is syntax-based)
test_framework: No automated test framework - Pine Script is validated by TradingView compiler. Use AST/syntax validation locally.
build_command: N/A - Pine Script runs on TradingView. Validate syntax structure manually.
test_command: N/A - no local test runner for Pine Script
verification_instructions: 1. Verify the file exists at indicators/phantom-edge.pine. 2. Verify it starts with //@version=6. 3. Verify it contains indicator() declaration with overlay=true. 4. Check for balanced brackets/parentheses. 5. Verify all required sections are present.
setup_instructions: No setup required - this is a single Pine Script file project.
environment_constraints: No Pine Script compiler available locally. Validation is limited to syntax structure checks. No network needed for this task.
contribution_requirements: From steering files: Use //@version=6, indicator() declaration, camelCase for variables, UPPER_SNAKE_CASE for constants, group inputs, use ta.* namespace, handle na values, use var for persistent state, avoid repainting with barstate.isconfirmed, place file in indicators/ directory with .pine extension.
key_patterns: Pine Script v6 conventions: inputs at top grouped by category, variables before logic, plots at end, alerts after plots. Section comments with // --- Section Name --- format. Use request.security() with barmerge.lookahead_off.
directory_structure: indicators/ - indicator scripts, strategies/ - strategy scripts, libraries/ - library scripts, .kiro/steering/ - project conventions
